}
  }
    console.log(fn.name, iface.getFunction(fn.name).selector)
  if (fn.type === 'function') {
for (const fn of Object.values(iface.fragments)) {
const iface = Election.interface
const Election = await ethers.getContractFactory("Election")
await election.registerVoter("0xf39Fd6e51aad88F6F4ce6aB8827279cffFb92266")
await election.openElection()
await election.addCandidate("Eve Joseph", "Cultural Lead")
await election.addCandidate("David Mathew", "Secretary")
await election.addCandidate("Carol Thomas", "Secretary")
await election.addCandidate("Bob Nair", "President")
await election.addCandidate("Alice Kumar", "President")
await election.addPosition("Cultural Lead")
await election.addPosition("Secretary")
await election.addPosition("President")
const election = await Election.attach("0x5FbDB2315678afecb367f032d93F642f64180aa3")
const Election = await ethers.getContractFactory("Election")
